lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਸਦਾ ਧਿਆਇ ਤੂ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੰਕਾਰੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo sadaa dhiaae too guramukh ekankaar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Become Gurmukh, and meditate forever on the Dear Lord, the One and Only Creator. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਾ ਕੇ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: guramukhaa ke mukh ujale gurasabadee beechaar |
lines.english: The faces of the Gurmukhs are radiant and bright; they reflect on the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਲਤਿ ਪਲਤਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਦੇ ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: halat palat sukh paaeide jap jap ridai muraar |
lines.english: They obtain peace in this world and the next, chanting and meditating within their hearts on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰ ਹੀ ਵਿਚਿ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ghar hee vich mehal paaeaa gurasabadee veechaar |2|
lines.english: Within the home of their own inner being, they obtain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence, reflecting on the Guru's Shabad. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਦੁਖ ਕਮਾਵਦੇ ਨਿਤ ਜੋਹੇ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: anadin dukh kamaavade nit johe jam jaale |
lines.english: Night and day, they suffer in pain; they see the noose of Death always hovering above them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਜੋ ਮੁਹ ਫੇਰਹਿ ਮਥੇ ਤਿਨ ਕਾਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: satagur te jo muh fereh mathe tin kaale |
lines.english: Those who turn their faces away from the True Guru shall have their faces blackened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa daataa ek hai aape bakhas karee |
lines.english: The One Lord is the Giver of all; He Himself bestows all blessings.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਦੇਖਨੀ ਬਹੁ ਚਿੰਤਾ ਪਰਜਾਲੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: supanai sukh na dekhanee bahu chintaa parajaale |3|
lines.english: Even in their dreams, they find no peace; they are consumed by the fires of intense anxiety. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਣਾ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਜਾਵਈ ਜਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: kahanaa kichhoo na jaavee jis bhaavai tis dee |
lines.english: No one else has any say in this; He gives just as He pleases.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਈਐ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥੯॥੪੨॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh paaeeai aape jaanai soe |4|9|42|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukhs obtain Him; He Himself knows Himself. ||4||9||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸੇਵੀਐ ਸਚੁ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib seveeai sach vaddiaaee dee |
lines.english: Serve your True Lord and Master, and you shall be blessed with true greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੂਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasai haumai door karee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, He abides in the mind, and egotism is driven out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਧਾਵਤੁ ਤਾ ਰਹੈ ਜਾ ਆਪੇ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: eihu man dhaavat taa rahai jaa aape nadar karee |1|
lines.english: This wandering mind comes to rest, when the Lord casts His Glance of Grace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re guramukh har naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, become Gurmukh, and meditate on the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਸਦ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਮਹਲੀ ਪਾਵੈ ਥਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan sad man vasai mahalee paavai thaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Treasure of the Naam abides forever within the mind, and one's place of rest is found in the Mansion of the Lord's Presence. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸ ਨਉ ਠਉਰ ਨ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh man tan andh hai tis nau tthaur na tthaau |
lines.english: The minds and bodies of the self-willed manmukhs are filled with darkness; they find no shelter, no place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਜੋਨੀ ਭਉਦਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈਂ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bahu jonee bhaudaa firai jiau sunyain ghar kaau |
lines.english: Through countless incarnations they wander lost, like crows in a deserted house.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramatee ghatt chaananaa sabad milai har naau |2|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the heart is illuminated. Through the Shabad, the Name of the Lord is received. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਭੀ ਅਨ ਕਉ ਸੇਵਦੇ ਪੜਿ ਵੇਦਾ ਕਰੈ ਪੂਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: lobhee an kau sevade parr vedaa karai pookaar |
lines.english: The greedy people serve others, instead of the Lord, although they loudly announce their reading of scriptures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਅੰਧੁ ਹੈ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹ ਗੁਬਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun bikhiaa andh hai maaeaa moh gubaar |
lines.english: In the corruption of the three qualities, there is blindness; in attachment to Maya, there is darkness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਵਿਸਾਰਿਆ ਜਗਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi visaariaa jagat pitaa pratipaal |
lines.english: In attachment to Maya, they have forgotten the Father, the Cherisher of the World.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਿਆ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਪਚਿ ਮੁਏ ਨਾ ਉਰਵਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: bikhiaa andar pach mue naa uravaar na paar |3|
lines.english: They are burnt to death by their own corruption; they are not at home, on either this shore or the one beyond. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਚਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੪॥੧੦॥੪੩॥
lines.translit: naanak guramat ubare sachaa naam samaal |4|10|43|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Guru's Teachings, you shall be saved, contemplating the True Name. ||4||10||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਝਹੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਅਚੇਤੁ ਹੈ ਸਭ ਬਧੀ ਜਮਕਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: baajhahu guroo achet hai sabh badhee jamakaal |
lines.english: Without the Guru, all are unconscious; they are held in bondage by the Messenger of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਉਥਾ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: trai gun maaeaa mohu hai guramukh chauthaa pad paae |
lines.english: The three qualities hold people in attachment to Maya. The Gurmukh attains the fourth state of higher consciousness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਮੇਲਾਇਅਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa melaaeian har naam vasiaa man aae |
lines.english: Granting His Grace, God unites us with Himself. The Name of the Lord comes to abide within the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਸਾਚਿ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re guramat saach rahaau |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, follow the Guru's Teachings and dwell in truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੋਤੈ ਜਿਨ ਕੈ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਨ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: potai jin kai pun hai tin satasangat melaae |1|
lines.english: Those who have the treasure of goodness join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੀ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਿਆ ਤਿਨ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jinee naam pachhaaniaa tin vittahu bal jaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who recognize the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੋ ਸਾਚੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saacho saach kamaavanaa saachai sabad milaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Practice truth, and only truth, and merge in the True Word of the Shabad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੁ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਗਾ ਚਲਾ ਤਿਨ ਕੈ ਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: aap chhodd charanee lagaa chalaa tin kai bhaae |
lines.english: Renouncing selfishness, I fall at their feet, and walk in harmony with His Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਹਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: laahaa har har naam milai sahaje naam samaae |2|
lines.english: Earning the Profit of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, I am intuitively absorbed in the Naam. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਐਸਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਲੋੜਿ ਲਹੁ ਜਿਦੂ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਚੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aisaa satagur lorr lahu jidoo paaeeai sach soe |
lines.english: Seek and find such a True Guru, who shall lead you to the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur mehal na paaeeai naam na paraapat hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is not found, and the Naam is not obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਸੁਰ ਸੰਘਾਰੈ ਸੁਖਿ ਵਸੈ ਜੋ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: asur sanghaarai sukh vasai jo tis bhaavai su hoe |3|
lines.english: Destroy your evil passions, and you shall dwell in peace. Whatever pleases the Lord comes to pass. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇਹਾ ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾਣਿਆ ਤੇਹੋ ਜੇਹਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jehaa satagur kar jaaniaa teho jehaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: As one knows the True Guru, so is the peace obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਕ ਜੋਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਮੂਰਤੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਵਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੪॥੧੧॥੪੪॥
lines.translit: naanak ek jot due mooratee sabad milaavaa hoe |4|11|44|
lines.english: O Nanak, the One Light has two forms; through the Shabad, union is attained. ||4||11||44||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹੁ ਸਹਸਾ ਮੂਲੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਭਾਉ ਲਾਏ ਜਨੁ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: ehu sahasaa moole naahee bhaau laae jan koe |
lines.english: There is no doubt at all about this, but those who love Him are very rare.
